title: PvP Indicator
description: This mod adds a customizable HUD that displays your health and hunger values anywhere on the screen. It solves the issue of having to look down at the hotbar during PvP.
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a30882515e05e7224ad53a634e430163f71dab76.png)
# ‚Äé ‚Äé ‚Äé‚Äé ‚Äé ‚Äé‚Äé ‚Äé¬Ý ‚Äé ‚Äé¬Ý ‚Äé ‚Äé ‚Äé ‚ÄéStop looking down to check your health.

In intense PvP, taking your eyes off the crosshair to check your hearts at the bottom of the screen can be a fatal mistake. **This mod solves that problem.**

It adds a customizable HUD that displays your **Health** and **Hunger** values anywhere on your screen. You can position it exactly where you look the most, ensuring you never die simply because you didn't realize you were low on health. 

Stay focused on the enemy, not your hotbar.

### We recommend placing the HUD near your crosshair for maximum awareness.

# Requirements
![Requirements](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3403fe1f9617f7e11b0dd257ad27298f84c3d69d.png)

# You likely need to download [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api).

Have any questions? [**Click here**](https://eron4u.com/) to see my links.  
_You can reach me faster on Discord._
